subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 13/16] exportd/mountd: use cache type from notifications to target scanning

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the handling of netlink multicast notifications in the NFS-utils code by parsing the cache type from the notification and only issuing GET_REQS for the caches that actually need servicing, reducing unnecessary netlink round-trips. If the notification cannot be parsed, it falls back to scanning all caches for that family. The patch also updates the cache_nfsd_nl_drain function to return a mask of caches with pending requests.
